author: codex

subagents.result: Identified exact operating-start, legal-notice, storm/natural-disaster, warranty, FHWA-guidance, and rebranding event-family candidates.

Identified exact Transforming Jamaica family and source-context project-status candidates; several source-nearby candidates were deferred because decisive text was not present in canonical raw_text/source_quote context.
Classified Bloomberg as a broad-key prune, Corporate Compliance as a true duplicate merge, and the remaining MTA parent collision as unresolved/risky.

implemented.change: Added exact event-family gates for operating-start records, legal notice submission/transmittal milestones, Superstorm Sandy natural disaster incidents, Winter Storm Fern response/kept-operating incidents, warranty expiration, FHWA CBD tolling guidance, and Metro-North Care rebranding.
guardrails: Did not map bare flash-flooding storm records to incidents.
Did not broadly map weather events, public/private venue events, workshops, tours, training, or generic special events.

implemented.change: Added exact context-backed project-status gates for Flushing bundle, Direct Fixation Track Replacement, and Fulton-Liberty Line CBTC; added exact Transforming Jamaica planning/report family classification.

Added reviewed broad-key prune for Bloomberg vendor/procurement record and merged the one-source MTA Corporate Compliance record into the richer MTA Corporate Compliance canonical record through durable identity overrides.

deferred.reason: Existing guardrail tests treat flash-flooding-only storm text and generic operated-through storm text as too broad. The canonical records do not currently preserve the stronger source quote needed for a safe exact context gate.
Live canonical payloads lack the decisive completed/continued-progress/continuation source wording surfaced in the audit; no rule was added from nearby-source knowledge alone.
Remaining duplicate-shaped groups are parent-MTA canonicalization decisions with prior alias-cycle risk; leave for a deliberate MTA parent consolidation lane.

next_lanes: Rebaseline event_family other=159 and implement only exact residual gates with preserved payload/raw_text/source_quote proof.

Audit whether materializer normalization context should safely include source block text when evidence_refs lack source_quote; this could unlock deferred project statuses without hard-coding source-nearby knowledge.
Run a deliberate MTA parent entity consolidation audit before touching the two remaining raw entity duplicate-key groups.
